notes: Run the full post-E004 robustness suite on the promoted lon15 buy setting. E005 slippage_values are one-way slips, so round-trip penalty is 2x each value. E007 risk grid is centered around the SL-adjusted reference from SL5->0.5%, which implies about 0.125% for SL20, then tested with a small conservative-to-slightly-aggressive grid.
